release_id: string; required; release id under review
ship_decision: string enum; required; one of SHIP, SHIP_WITH_WATCH, NO_SHIP

milestone_completion.milestone_id: string; required; sort milestone_completion by milestone_id ascending
milestone_completion.complete_primary: integer; required; completed primary work item count for this milestone
milestone_completion.primary_total: integer; required; primary work item denominator for this milestone
milestone_completion.completion_pct: number; required; percent rounded to 1 decimal place

gating_work_item_ids: string; required; sorted unique non-complete release work item ids gating readiness

blocker_cause_counts.exact blocker cause string: integer count; required; unresolved high-impact blockers only

critical_dependency_chains: string work item id; ordered path from blocked release work item to non-complete dependency
watch_work_item_ids: string; required; sorted unique non-complete primary release work item ids that remain watch items but are not hard readiness gates

watch_blocker_cause_counts.exact blocker cause string: integer count; required; unresolved low- or medium-impact blockers only

watch_milestone_summary.milestone_id: string; required; sort by milestone_id ascending
watch_milestone_summary.owner_team: string; required; milestone owner_team from authoritative milestone data
watch_milestone_summary.watch_primary_count: integer; required; count of non-gating watch_work_item_ids assigned to this milestone

readiness_score: number; required; completed primary work divided by primary denominator, rounded to 3 decimal places
